blended.narrative: Silverton Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,419 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 25".
